$comment: Source: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory#path-specific-rules — Check this page periodically for new fields.
title: Rule Frontmatter Schema
description: Schema for Claude Code rule (.claude/rules/*.md) YAML frontmatter fields

paths.description: Glob patterns that determine when this rule is loaded. When present, the rule is conditional — only loaded when matching files are in context. When absent, the rule is unconditional — always loaded. Comma-separated string or YAML list.
